name: deepbiology
description: Codex plugin for DeepBiology Lab with shared agent skills and MCP tools for model-aware genomics workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Submit genomics research workflows to DeepBiology Lab from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Provides thirteen shared agent skills and MCP tools for DeepBiology Lab, including model- and assay-aware cell-line resolution, gene and variant annotation, four genomics inference workflows (Q1-Q4), setup, model discovery, cancer-mutation lookup, job status, result retrieval, and local artifact downloads.
defaultPrompt: Analyze the transcription regulation of CCND1 in myeloid cell lines.
Scan for important enhancer positions near the MYC gene.
What's the impact of this mutation on the CD34 enhancer region?
